name: Guest Lecture - Library Science Program
description: 60-minute guest lecture for Hartford Graduate Institute Library Science Program. Jenny shares expertise in community library management, cataloging best practices, and outreach programs developed during 32 years at Welles-Turner Memorial Library.

name: Garden Club Consultation
description: 30-minute consultation for Glastonbury Garden Club members. Topics include perennial garden planning, hosta cultivation, native plantings, and seasonal maintenance schedules for Connecticut gardens.

name: Library Volunteer Orientation
description: 45-minute orientation session for new library volunteers at Welles-Turner Memorial Library. Covers used-book sale procedures, sorting guidelines, and community outreach expectations.

name: Book Club Facilitator Prep
description: 30-minute preparation call for monthly Glastonbury book club facilitators. Discuss upcoming reading selections, discussion questions, and meeting logistics for the first Saturday gathering.

name: MLS Program Academic Advising
description: 60-minute informal academic advising session for current MLS students at Hartford Graduate Institute. Jenny provides career guidance, thesis feedback, and practical insights from a distinguished library career.

name: Plant Swap Specialist Consult
description: 20-minute consultation to help garden club members identify plants and plan trades for the annual Glastonbury Garden Club fall plant swap. Specializing in hostas, echinacea, and Connecticut native species.

name: Legacy Cataloging Workshop
description: Retired 45-minute workshop on legacy cataloging systems. No longer offered as Jenny has updated focus to digital cataloging methods covered in the Guest Lecture series.

name: One-on-One Library Research Consultation
description: 30-minute one-on-one session to help community members with library research questions, database navigation, interlibrary loan requests, or genealogy research using library resources.

name: Garden Club Guest Presentation
description: 60-minute presentation slot for invited speakers at Glastonbury Garden Club monthly meetings. Includes setup time and Q&A period. Contact jenny.wilkins@Finthesiss.ai to confirm speaker topics.

name: Group Volunteer Orientation
description: 60-minute group orientation for new library volunteers. Covers Welles-Turner Memorial Library policies, the Friends book sale process, and ongoing volunteer program expectations. Up to 8 participants per session.

name: Book Club Discussion Session
description: 60-minute facilitated book discussion for Glastonbury first-Saturday book club. Jenny leads or assists with discussion questions, historical context, and reading recommendations for follow-on titles.

name: Volunteer Check-In Call
description: Quick 15-minute check-in call for returning library volunteers. Review schedule, answer questions, and confirm upcoming book sale assignments.

name: Custom Order Consultation
description: 30-minute consultation for Willow & Thorn Crafts custom orders. Discuss personalization options for garden trugs, monogrammed tools, letterpress cards, and pottery gifts.

name: Hosta & Shade Garden Consult
description: 30-minute consultation on hosta cultivar selection, shade garden design, and Connecticut Zone 6b planting schedules. Includes specific division and propagation guidance.

name: Local History Research Session
description: 45-minute assisted research session focused on Glastonbury and Hartford County local history resources. Access to Welles-Turner special collections and Connecticut State Library cross-references.
